nasb.text: and said, “What are you willing to give me to betray Him to you?” And they weighed out thirty pieces of silver to him.

esv.text: and said, “What will you give me if I deliver him over to you?” And they paid him thirty pieces of silver.

cnv.text: “如果我把他交給你們，你們願意給我甚麼呢？”他們就給了他三十塊銀子。

ccb.text: “如果我把耶稣交给你们，你们肯出多少钱？”他们就给了他三十块银子。

csbs.text: 说：“如果我把他交给你们，你们愿意给我什么？”他们就约定给他三十个银钱。
